name: Black and White Brownie Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a saucepan, melt the honey, strong coffee, butter, and chocolate chips. Stir often until smooth.
3. Add the eggs to the saucepan one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the saucepan, stirring well.
5. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the brownie batter into a greased 8-inch x 8-inch pan lined with greased wax paper. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
7. Brush the cooled brownies with coffee, rum (or Kahlua), or amaretto.
8. To make the frosting, cream the softened butter until light and fluffy. Gradually add the confectioners sugar and vanilla, mixing until smooth. If needed, add a little milk to achieve a smoother consistency.
9. Spread the frosting evenly over the cooled brownies. Refrigerate until firm.
10. For the chocolate topping, melt the chocolate chips, butter, and vegetable shortening in a double boiler. Pour over the frosting layer and spread evenly.
11. Sprinkle almond slices on top if desired. Allow to cool completely before cutting into small squares.
